name: Kth Smallest Element (Min Heap)
description:
To find the Kth Smallest Element in an array using a Min Heap, we follow these steps:

  • Step 1: Build a Min Heap from all elements in the input array. This takes O(N) time.
  • Step 2: Extract the minimum element from the heap k-1 times. Each extraction takes O(log N) time.
  • Step 3: After k-1 extractions, the element at the top of the Min Heap is the Kth smallest element.

The total time complexity is O(N + K log N), and the space complexity is O(N) to store the heap.
